item.title: Wireshark 101
item.description: Wireshark is tool used for creating and analyzing PCAPs(network packet capture files). Wireshark uses OSI layers to break down packets. 7 …

item.description: The struct module includes functions for converting between strings of bytes and native Python data types such as numbers and strings. It is …

item.title: Socket Programming - Simple Client & Server
item.description: Sockets and the socket API are used to send messages across a network. Let’s focus on building simple echo client and server using TCP …
